seo.title: Contact the Showcase Demo
seo.description: Talk to the demo company about smart equipment, energy systems, and modular hardware engagements.

sections.title: Open a technical conversation.
sections.description: Share enough context for an engineer to respond meaningfully. The demo form submits to the standard /api/lead handler.
sections.imageAlt: Operator workstation with a phone and an open notebook

sections.title: Direct channels
sections.description: If a written form is not the right fit, use the channels below. The mailbox and phone number from site.config.ts are appended automatically below the listed channels.

items.question: How quickly do you reply?
items.answer: Sales engineering replies on the next business day in the customer's timezone. Service desk requests are triaged within four business hours.

items.question: What information helps the first reply land usefully?
items.answer: A short description of the process, current equipment, success metric, and the country where the system will operate is usually enough to send back a credible first response.

items.question: Do you sign mutual NDAs before technical detail?
items.answer: Yes, on request. A standard mutual NDA template is available; customer paper is reviewed within five business days.

items.question: Can samples ship before a purchase order?
items.answer: Sample units against an evaluation agreement are common for pilot deployments. The terms cover handling, return, and conversion to a production order.
